---
title: "105-pop-stats"
author: "joe sweeney"
date: "2026-06-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

loading libs
```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(ggtree)
library(tidyverse)
library(phangorn)
```

loading metadata
```{r}
align496<-read_csv("outputs/100/align-496.csv", col_names = c("Ind","Reads","Dedup","Cov"))
filtered_align <- subset(align496, Dedup > 500000)
filtered_align <- subset(filtered_align, Cov > 0.1)
meta<-read_csv("metadata/meta01222025.csv")
m_fil <-left_join(filtered_align,meta, by="Ind") %>% 
  mutate(Path=paste0("data/",Ind,".sort.flt.bam")) %>% 
  mutate(Pop=`Tributary/Collection Location`)
m_nwrk <- subset(m_fil, Species == "newarkensis" )
exclude_sites <- c("NV12", "NV17", "NV18", "NV19")
m_nwrk_west <- subset(m_nwrk, !Pop %in% exclude_sites)
```

making txt files for each pop site with a list of all inds found there 
this is required to calculate Fst using vcf tools
make a folder called poplists first
```{r}
m_nwrk$`Tributary/Collection Location` <- gsub(" ", "", m_nwrk$`Tributary/Collection Location`)
m_nwrk$`Tributary/Collection Location` <- gsub("'", "", m_nwrk$`Tributary/Collection Location`)
populations <- split(m_nwrk, m_nwrk$`Tributary/Collection Location`)

for (pop_name in names(populations)) {
  writeLines(populations[[pop_name]]$GVL_Code, paste0("poplists/", pop_name, ".txt"))
}
```

now using vcftools to calculate global fst
```{sh}
mkdir outputs/105
sbatch run_fst_all_nwrk_pops.sh
```
